name: Barb's Special Sweet Breads Part I
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, sprinkle the yeast over the water and stir until dissolved.
2. Beat the egg into the yeast mixture and set aside to rest.
3. Sift together the flour, sugar, and salt. Add the yeast mixture. Mix until a dough forms.
4. If the dough is too moist, add some additional flour. Knead for 10 minutes more.
5. Roll out to an 11-inch square. Spread half the butter over the surface of the dough.
6. Fold the dough into thirds and wrap in a damp cloth. Refrigerate for 20 minutes.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 two more times, chilling for 20 minutes each time.
8. While the dough is chilling the last time, prepare any fillings, icings, or additional recipes needed for the finished pastries.
